_label: CACHED / LABELED raw reviews for app 839285684 (mirror of sample for offline).

reviews.author: FitMom42
reviews.title: Charged after trial without clear warning
reviews.content: I tried the free trial and then got charged for a yearly subscription. The cancel flow is buried and support took days to reply. Please make billing clearer.

reviews.author: YogaJen
reviews.title: Subscription trap
reviews.content: Hard to cancel the subscription. Apple subscription page works but in-app it keeps pushing annual plans. Refund requested.

reviews.author: CardioKate
reviews.title: Workouts are good but video lag
reviews.content: Love the home workout plans but the trainer videos stutter on Wi-Fi. Following along is frustrating when the stream buffers mid-set.

reviews.author: HomeGymHero
reviews.title: Can't customize rest timers
reviews.content: Between circuits the rest timer is too short and I cannot adjust it. For beginners this makes workouts unusable.

reviews.author: StrengthSara
reviews.title: Great plans
reviews.content: The guided plans keep me consistent. Would love more dumbbell-only filters though.

reviews.author: BusyBee
reviews.title: App crashes when saving workout
reviews.content: Crashes every time I finish and tap save. Lost progress twice this week on iPhone 14.

reviews.author: MorningMiles
reviews.title: Login loop after update
reviews.content: After updating I keep getting signed out. Password reset email never arrives.

reviews.author: PilatesPat
reviews.title: Solid but too many paywalls
reviews.content: Content quality is high. Still, almost every program is behind subscription which hurts discovery for new users.

reviews.author: NewbieNell
reviews.title: Modifications unclear
reviews.content: As a beginner I need clearer exercise modifications. The UI shows advanced moves without easy alternatives.

reviews.author: NightOwlFit
reviews.title: Notifications spam
reviews.content: Marketing notifications are constant even after I disabled workout reminders. Settings seem ignored.

reviews.author: RefundRita
reviews.title: Unexpected renewal
reviews.content: Yearly plan renewed without a reminder email from the app. I only noticed on my bank statement.

reviews.author: StreamSam
reviews.title: Offline downloads missing
reviews.content: Said I could download workouts for gym basement with no signal. Download button does nothing.

reviews.author: HappyHaley
reviews.title: Finally consistent
reviews.content: Best home gym app I've used. The women-focused programming feels practical.

reviews.author: DuplicateUser
reviews.title: Charged after trial without clear warning
reviews.content: I tried the free trial and then got charged for a yearly subscription. The cancel flow is buried and support took days to reply. Please make billing clearer.

reviews.author: ConflictCarl
reviews.title: Billing was easy for me
reviews.content: Canceling subscription via Apple subscriptions was straightforward. Not sure why others struggle.

reviews.author: TimerTina
reviews.title: Rest timer feedback
reviews.content: Please let us set custom rest intervals per exercise. Default 20s is too aggressive.

reviews.author: CrashChris
reviews.title: Crash on save
reviews.content: Same crash when saving workout history. Happens on cellular and Wi-Fi.

reviews.author: FilterFaye
reviews.title: Need equipment filters
reviews.content: Want a filter for no-equipment only. Current filters mix resistance bands into bodyweight plans.

reviews.author: PaywallPam
reviews.title: Can't try enough free content
reviews.content: Free tier is too limited to evaluate the subscription. Conversion suffers because trial content is sparse.

reviews.author: StableSteve
reviews.title: Mixed feelings on pricing
reviews.content: Workouts are useful but annual price feels high versus competitors. Monthly option is easy to miss.
